title: Spam Message Detection
tagline: Detect duplicate messages efficiently using hashing
realWorld:
Spam Detection in Messaging Applications

Used in messaging applications to detect spam by identifying repeated or duplicate messages quickly.
description: Given a list of messages, determine if any message appears more than once. This can be efficiently solved using hashing or a set.
statement: Given an array messages, return true if any value appears at least twice, otherwise return false. For example: - ["hi", "hello", "hi"] -> true - ["spam", "ham", "jam"] -> false
